title: Smuts United FC makes comeback in Top 8
description: SEDGEFIELD NEWS - Smuts United has made an...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"SEDGEFIELD NEWS - Smuts United has made an impressive comeback to finish in the Top 8 of the Safa Eden Hollywoodbets Regional League for the 2024/25 season.","html":"SEDGEFIELD NEWS - Smuts United has made an impressive comeback to finish in the Top 8 of the Safa Eden Hollywoodbets Regional League for the 2024/25 season."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Despite a slow start to the campaign where they dropped vital points and hovered near the bottom of the log, the team showed strong character in the second leg of the season - securing crucial wins against some of the league's toughest opponents."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Smuts United also made headlines earlier in 2025 when they were crowned Knysna Local Football Association Easter Tournament champions (KLFA), defeating African Eagles in the final.","html":"Smuts United also made headlines earlier in 2025 when they were crowned Knysna Local Football Association Easter Tournament champions (KLFA), defeating African Eagles in the final."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The final league standings saw Smuts United earn 39 points from 30 matches, recording 11 wins, six draws, and 13 losses with an impressive 65 goals scored over the season."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Meanwhile, Sedgefield's football spirit continues to rise. Young Boys FC and Sedge United FC are currently leading the KLFA Promotional League, with both clubs pushing hard for a promotional play-off spot.","html":"Meanwhile, Sedgefield's football spirit continues to rise. Young Boys FC and Sedge United FC are currently leading the KLFA Promotional League, with both clubs pushing hard for a promotional play-off spot."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Smuts United FC makes comeback in Top 8
